events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: reversed primary/secondary landing on the transformer is a critical, fail-condition defect — it would impress full primary voltage onto secondary-rated equipment (~2.3x overvoltage) and invalidates the 250.30 separately-derived-system grounding scheme. Recommended immediate lockout/tagout, re-landing conductors per nameplate, re-verifying grounding, and testing before any re-energization.
